title: Nigh-Omniscience
wikitext:
[[File:Uatu_(Earth-616).jpg|thumb|300px|The Watcher knows almost everything.]]

==Summary==
The power to '''know <u>almost</u> everything in existence'''. Lesser version of [[Omniscience]].

The user knows almost everything in existence while being blocked from certain details or being limited in other ways, possibly only being able to see one timeline or universe, or have just small patches of information that are missing or blocked out. Thus allowing one to keep their sense of free will and uncertainty.

This power is also called limited Omniscience.

==Limitations==
* The user's knowledge is limited in certain ways/areas: they may be limited to certain areas or subjects of knowledge or lack knowledge about certain areas.

==Users==
*[[Eternity]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Death of the Endless]] ([[DC Comics]])
*[[Goddess of Dawn]] ([[Invaders of the Rokujouma!?]])
*[[Demiurge (11eyes-Tsumi to Batsu to Aganai no Shoujo)|Demiurge]] ([[11 eyes]])
*[[Chronos (Chrono Clock)|Chrono]] ([[Chrono Clock]])
*[[Et Ca Repha]] ([[The Spirit of Eternity Sword]])
*[[Nayru]], [[Farore]], and [[Din]] ([[The Legend of Zelda]])
